result.stdout:
Usage: doclint lint [-e|-exclude <exclude>][] [-i|-include <include>][] [-w|-working-directory <working-directory>]

lint documentation of files in specified directory

Options:
  -e, -exclude[]?          Paths to exclude from linting.
  -i, -include[]?          Paths to include in linting.
  -w, -working-directory?  Working directory.
